nextToken.description: The token to use in a subsequent ListProjects operation to return the next set of results.

projects.description: An array of structures that contain the configuration details of the projects in the Region.

activeExperimentCount.description: The number of experiments currently in the project.

activeLaunchCount.description: The number of ongoing launches currently in the project.

arn.description: The name or ARN of the project.

createdTime.description: The date and time that the project is created.

experimentCount.description: The number of experiments currently in the project.

featureCount.description: The number of features currently in the project.

lastUpdatedTime.description: The date and time that the project was most recently updated.

launchCount.description: The number of launches currently in the project, including launches that are ongoing, completed, and not started yet.

tags.description: The list of tag keys and values associated with this project.

nextToken.description: The token to use in a subsequent ListSegments operation to return the next set of results.

segments.description: An array of structures that contain information about the segments in this Region.

createdTime.description: The date and time that this segment was created.

experimentCount.description: The number of experiments that this segment is used in. This count includes all current experiments, not just those that are currently running.

lastUpdatedTime.description: The date and time that this segment was most recently updated.

launchCount.description: The number of launches that this segment is used in. This count includes all current launches, not just those that are currently running.

pattern.description: The pattern that defines the attributes to use to evalute whether a user session will be in the segment. For more information about the pattern syntax, see Segment rule pattern syntax.

tags.description: The list of tag keys and values associated with this launch.

results.description: An array of structures, where each structure displays the results of one feature evaluation assignment to one user session.

details.description: If this user was assigned to a launch or experiment, this field lists the launch or experiment name.

entityId.description: An internal ID that represents a unique user session of the application.

feature.description: The name of the feature being evaluated.

project.description: The name or ARN of the project that contains the feature being evaluated.

reason.description: Specifies the reason that the user session was assigned this variation. Possible values include DEFAULT, meaning the user was served the default variation; LAUNCH_RULE_MATCH, if the user session was enrolled in a launch; or EXPERIMENT_RULE_MATCH, if the user session was enrolled in an experiment.

value.description: The value assigned to this variation to differentiate it from the other variations of this feature.

boolValue.description: If this feature uses the Boolean variation type, this field contains the Boolean value of this variation.

doubleValue.description: If this feature uses the double integer variation type, this field contains the double integer value of this variation.

longValue.description: If this feature uses the long variation type, this field contains the long value of this variation.

stringValue.description: If this feature uses the string variation type, this field contains the string value of this variation.

variation.description: The name of the variation that was served to the user session.

experiment.description: A structure containing the configuration details of the experiment that you created.

createdTime.description: The date and time that the experiment is first created.

execution.description: A structure that contains the date and time that the experiment started and ended.

endedTime.description: The date and time that the experiment ended.

startedTime.description: The date and time that the experiment started.

lastUpdatedTime.description: The date and time that the experiment was most recently updated.

metricGoals.description: An array of structures that defines the metrics used for the experiment, and whether a higher or lower value for each metric is the goal.

onlineAbDefinition.description: A structure that contains the configuration of which variation to use as the "control" version. The "control" version is used for comparison with other variations. This structure also specifies how much experiment traffic is allocated to each variation.

controlTreatmentName.description: The name of the variation that is the default variation that the other variations are compared to.

treatmentWeights.description: A set of key-value pairs. The keys are variation names, and the values are the portion of experiment traffic to be assigned to that variation. The traffic portion is specified in thousandths of a percent, so 20,000 for a variation would allocate 20% of the experiment traffic to that variation.

project.description: The name or ARN of the project that contains this experiment.

randomizationSalt.description: This value is used when Evidently assigns a particular user session to the experiment. It helps create a randomization ID to determine which variation the user session is served. This randomization ID is a combination of the entity ID and randomizationSalt.

samplingRate.description:
In thousandths of a percent, the amount of the available audience that is allocated to this experiment. The available audience is the total audience minus the audience that you have allocated to overrides or current launches of this feature.

This is represented in thousandths of a percent, so a value of 10,000 is 10% of the available audience.

schedule.description: A structure that contains the time and date that Evidently completed the analysis of the experiment.

analysisCompleteTime.description: The time and date that Evidently completed the analysis of the experiment.

segment.description: The audience segment being used for the experiment, if a segment is being used.

statusReason.description: If the experiment was stopped, this is the string that was entered by the person who stopped the experiment, to explain why it was stopped.

tags.description: The list of tag keys and values associated with this experiment.

treatments.description: An array of structures that describe the configuration of each feature variation used in the experiment.

type.description: The type of this experiment. Currently, this value must be aws.experiment.onlineab.

feature.description: A structure that contains information about the new feature.

createdTime.description: The date and time that the feature is created.

defaultVariation.description:
The name of the variation that is used as the default variation. The default variation is served to users who are not allocated to any ongoing launches or experiments of this feature.

This variation must also be listed in the variations structure.

If you omit defaultVariation, the first variation listed in the variations structure is used as the default variation.

entityOverrides.description:
A set of key-value pairs that specify users who should always be served a specific variation of a feature. Each key specifies a user using their user ID, account ID, or some other identifier. The value specifies the name of the variation that the user is to be served.

For the override to be successful, the value of the key must match the entityId used in the EvaluateFeature operation.

evaluationRules.description: An array of structures that define the evaluation rules for the feature.

evaluationStrategy.description: If this value is ALL_RULES, the traffic allocation specified by any ongoing launches or experiments is being used. If this is DEFAULT_VARIATION, the default variation is being served to all users.

lastUpdatedTime.description: The date and time that the feature was most recently updated.

project.description: The name or ARN of the project that contains the feature.

tags.description: The list of tag keys and values associated with this feature.

valueType.description: Defines the type of value used to define the different feature variations. For more information, see Variation types

variations.description: An array of structures that contain the configuration of the feature's different variations.

launch.description: A structure that contains the configuration of the launch that was created.

createdTime.description: The date and time that the launch is created.

execution.description: A structure that contains information about the start and end times of the launch.

endedTime.description: The date and time that the launch ended.

startedTime.description: The date and time that the launch started.

groups.description: An array of structures that define the feature variations that are being used in the launch.

lastUpdatedTime.description: The date and time that the launch was most recently updated.

metricMonitors.description: An array of structures that define the metrics that are being used to monitor the launch performance.

project.description: The name or ARN of the project that contains the launch.

randomizationSalt.description: This value is used when Evidently assigns a particular user session to the launch, to help create a randomization ID to determine which variation the user session is served. This randomization ID is a combination of the entity ID and randomizationSalt.

scheduledSplitsDefinition.description: An array of structures that define the traffic allocation percentages among the feature variations during each step of the launch.

steps.description: An array of structures that define the traffic allocation percentages among the feature variations during each step of the launch. This also defines the start time of each step.

statusReason.description: If the launch was stopped, this is the string that was entered by the person who stopped the launch, to explain why it was stopped.

tags.description: The list of tag keys and values associated with this launch.

project.description: A structure that contains information about the created project.

activeExperimentCount.description: The number of ongoing experiments currently in the project.

activeLaunchCount.description: The number of ongoing launches currently in the project.

appConfigResource.description: This structure defines the configuration of how your application integrates with AppConfig to run client-side evaluation.

applicationId.description: The ID of the AppConfig application to use for client-side evaluation.

configurationProfileId.description: The ID of the AppConfig profile to use for client-side evaluation.

environmentId.description: The ID of the AppConfig environment to use for client-side evaluation. This must be an environment that is within the application that you specify for applicationId.

arn.description: The name or ARN of the project.

createdTime.description: The date and time that the project is created.

dataDelivery.description: A structure that contains information about where Evidently is to store evaluation events for longer term storage.

cloudWatchLogs.description: If the project stores evaluation events in CloudWatch Logs, this structure stores the log group name.

logGroup.description: The name of the log group where the project stores evaluation events.

s3Destination.description: If the project stores evaluation events in an Amazon S3 bucket, this structure stores the bucket name and bucket prefix.

bucket.description: The name of the bucket in which Evidently stores evaluation events.

prefix.description: The bucket prefix in which Evidently stores evaluation events.

experimentCount.description: The number of experiments currently in the project. This includes all experiments that have been created and not deleted, whether they are ongoing or not.

featureCount.description: The number of features currently in the project.

lastUpdatedTime.description: The date and time that the project was most recently updated.

launchCount.description: The number of launches currently in the project. This includes all launches that have been created and not deleted, whether they are ongoing or not.

tags.description: The list of tag keys and values associated with this project.

segment.description: A structure that contains the complete information about the segment that was just created.

createdTime.description: The date and time that this segment was created.

experimentCount.description: The number of experiments that this segment is used in. This count includes all current experiments, not just those that are currently running.

lastUpdatedTime.description: The date and time that this segment was most recently updated.

launchCount.description: The number of launches that this segment is used in. This count includes all current launches, not just those that are currently running.

Possible values include DEFAULT, meaning the user was served the default variation; LAUNCH_RULE_MATCH, if the user session was enrolled in a launch; EXPERIMENT_RULE_MATCH, if the user session was enrolled in an experiment; or ENTITY_OVERRIDES_MATCH, if the user's entityId matches an override rule.

value.description: The value assigned to this variation to differentiate it from the other variations of this feature.

valueType.description: Defines the type of value used to define the different feature variations. For more information, see Variation types

variations.description: An array of structures that contain the configuration of the feature's different variations.

launch.description: A structure that contains the new configuration of the launch that was updated.

createdTime.description: The date and time that the launch is created.

execution.description: A structure that contains information about the start and end times of the launch.

endedTime.description: The date and time that the launch ended.

startedTime.description: The date and time that the launch started.

groups.description: An array of structures that define the feature variations that are being used in the launch.

lastUpdatedTime.description: The date and time that the launch was most recently updated.

metricMonitors.description: An array of structures that define the metrics that are being used to monitor the launch performance.

project.description: The name or ARN of the project that contains the launch.

randomizationSalt.description: This value is used when Evidently assigns a particular user session to the launch, to help create a randomization ID to determine which variation the user session is served. This randomization ID is a combination of the entity ID and randomizationSalt.

scheduledSplitsDefinition.description: An array of structures that define the traffic allocation percentages among the feature variations during each step of the launch.

steps.description: An array of structures that define the traffic allocation percentages among the feature variations during each step of the launch. This also defines the start time of each step.

statusReason.description: If the launch was stopped, this is the string that was entered by the person who stopped the launch, to explain why it was stopped.

tags.description: The list of tag keys and values associated with this launch.

project.description: A structure containing information about the updated project.

activeExperimentCount.description: The number of ongoing experiments currently in the project.

activeLaunchCount.description: The number of ongoing launches currently in the project.

appConfigResource.description: This structure defines the configuration of how your application integrates with AppConfig to run client-side evaluation.

applicationId.description: The ID of the AppConfig application to use for client-side evaluation.

configurationProfileId.description: The ID of the AppConfig profile to use for client-side evaluation.

environmentId.description: The ID of the AppConfig environment to use for client-side evaluation. This must be an environment that is within the application that you specify for applicationId.

arn.description: The name or ARN of the project.

createdTime.description: The date and time that the project is created.

dataDelivery.description: A structure that contains information about where Evidently is to store evaluation events for longer term storage.

cloudWatchLogs.description: If the project stores evaluation events in CloudWatch Logs, this structure stores the log group name.

logGroup.description: The name of the log group where the project stores evaluation events.

s3Destination.description: If the project stores evaluation events in an Amazon S3 bucket, this structure stores the bucket name and bucket prefix.

bucket.description: The name of the bucket in which Evidently stores evaluation events.

prefix.description: The bucket prefix in which Evidently stores evaluation events.

experimentCount.description: The number of experiments currently in the project. This includes all experiments that have been created and not deleted, whether they are ongoing or not.

featureCount.description: The number of features currently in the project.

lastUpdatedTime.description: The date and time that the project was most recently updated.

launchCount.description: The number of launches currently in the project. This includes all launches that have been created and not deleted, whether they are ongoing or not.

tags.description: The list of tag keys and values associated with this project.

project.description: A structure containing details about the project that you updated.

activeExperimentCount.description: The number of ongoing experiments currently in the project.

activeLaunchCount.description: The number of ongoing launches currently in the project.

appConfigResource.description: This structure defines the configuration of how your application integrates with AppConfig to run client-side evaluation.

applicationId.description: The ID of the AppConfig application to use for client-side evaluation.

configurationProfileId.description: The ID of the AppConfig profile to use for client-side evaluation.

environmentId.description: The ID of the AppConfig environment to use for client-side evaluation. This must be an environment that is within the application that you specify for applicationId.

arn.description: The name or ARN of the project.

createdTime.description: The date and time that the project is created.

dataDelivery.description: A structure that contains information about where Evidently is to store evaluation events for longer term storage.

cloudWatchLogs.description: If the project stores evaluation events in CloudWatch Logs, this structure stores the log group name.

logGroup.description: The name of the log group where the project stores evaluation events.

s3Destination.description: If the project stores evaluation events in an Amazon S3 bucket, this structure stores the bucket name and bucket prefix.

bucket.description: The name of the bucket in which Evidently stores evaluation events.

prefix.description: The bucket prefix in which Evidently stores evaluation events.

experimentCount.description: The number of experiments currently in the project. This includes all experiments that have been created and not deleted, whether they are ongoing or not.

featureCount.description: The number of features currently in the project.

lastUpdatedTime.description: The date and time that the project was most recently updated.

launchCount.description: The number of launches currently in the project. This includes all launches that have been created and not deleted, whether they are ongoing or not.

tags.description: The list of tag keys and values associated with this project.
